name: c-block-algorithm-panel
description: A local, source-authoritative C algorithm learning and visual assembly workbench.
author: HAN Chen

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.pack: npm run build && electron-builder --config build/electron-builder.beta.json --dir --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:beta: npm run build && electron-builder --config build/electron-builder.beta.json --mac --publish never
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run deps:check
scripts.deps:check: npm run deps:prepare && depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs '.dependency-cruiser-build/**/*.js' && npm run architecture:check
scripts.test:e2e:m2: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/m2-workbench.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:m3a: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/m3a-editing.spec.ts
scripts.verify:m2: vitest run tests/core/block-index.test.ts tests/core/statement-projector.test.ts tests/core/symbols.test.ts tests/core/builtins.test.ts tests/renderer/source-offset-map.test.ts tests/shared/source-import.test.ts tests/electron/source-import.test.ts tests/ui/explanation.test.ts tests/ui/run-panel.test.ts
scripts.verify:m3a: npm run typecheck && npm run deps:check && vitest run tests/core/editing tests/ui/exact-source-history.test.ts tests/ui/edit-panel.test.ts tests/renderer/source-offset-map.test.ts
scripts.verify:m3b: npm run typecheck && npm run deps:check && vitest run tests/core/editing/m3b-engine.test.ts tests/core/editing/statements.test.ts tests/core/editing/rename.test.ts tests/app/parse-stability.test.ts tests/app/source-sync-controller.test.ts tests/app/projection-presenter.test.ts tests/app/structure-edit-controller.test.ts tests/app/structure-edit-selection.test.ts tests/ui/exact-source-history.test.ts tests/ui/code-pane-direct-input-contract.test.ts tests/ui/edit-panel-external-confirm.test.ts tests/ui/structure-edit-panel.test.ts tests/ui/block-tree-interaction.test.ts
scripts.verify:m5a:cfg: npm run typecheck && npm run deps:check && vitest run tests/core/parser-inspection.test.ts tests/analysis/cfg-foundation.test.ts tests/analysis/cfg-gold.test.ts
scripts.verify:m5a:analysis: npm run typecheck && npm run deps:check && vitest run tests/core/parser-inspection.test.ts tests/analysis
scripts.verify:m5b: npm run typecheck && npm run deps:check && vitest run tests/runner tests/ui/run-panel.test.ts tests/ui/block-tree-interaction.test.ts tests/ui/explanation.test.ts tests/ui/explanation-view.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:m3b: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/m3b-editing.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:m4: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/m4-assembly.spec.ts tests/e2e/m4-robustness.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:m5: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/m5-diagnostics.spec.ts
